meaning: n.计算器,计数器,计算者,柜台,筹码adv.prep.相反地
examples: She was serving behind the counter.
He banged the money down on the counter.
He propped his elbows upon a greasy counter.
Be prepared to move quickly and order in Spanish from the women dancing behind the counter.
If a counter point representative is needed, please choose someone more representative of the counter point.
